title: The Puking Cats Anthem
summary: Cats are wreaking havoc by puking in every corner of the home, specifically choosing to target the bed while inexplicably avoiding their litter boxes. One particularly finicky feline spends an entire day vomiting throughout the house, leading to confusion and a call for others to join in the feline-themed song.

highlightQuote.text: I'm confused because they don't puke in their litter box.

transcript.text: It goes cats are puking everywhere.

places.name: House
places.description: A home thick with the sour scent of bile and the rhythmic, wet retching of a cat sickened since dawn, this is the unlikely threshold where Izzy first received the brilliant, transformative glow of her special new light.
